title: Create Ponder [Frozen]
description: The Ponder function spit from Create
body:
# Create Ponder

The Ponder function split from Create

Ponder is an in-game Create tutorial with smooth animations (actually loading structures and simulating them in Ponder Screen). Select the item with Ponder Scene in inventory and press and hold [W] to open it.

So that the modpacker could directly use the Ponder function instead of using a full Create

This mod is not compatible with Create and have `Ponder for KubeJS` built-in now.

Note: this mod only provide Ponder function. So, you should download [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Ponder for KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/ponder) if you want to have a full Create!
